title: corybas cyclopensis
intro: Corybas cyclopensis, also known as the 'Goblin Orchid', is a species of terrestrial orchid found in various parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corybas cyclopensis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may vary due to limited research and regulatory considerations.
